characters.name: The Narrator
characters.description: TheLemony Narratorof the show, who helps the series keep up its fast-paced plot. Actor Allusion: There are plenty throughout the series, especially noticable in Season 4 now thatRon Howardhimself is an actual, canonical character in the universe. Berserk Button: Using "Opie" as an insult and poorly narrated shows like Scandalmakers are his top two ones. Celebrity Paradox: Bizarrely, despite that the narrator makes constant references to Howard’s career and more-or-less subtly portrays Howard in a positive light throughout Season 4, he still refers to the Ron Howard appearing in the actual show in third person.Lampshadedin the re-edit of Season 4:Narrator: When I...conic producer Ron Howard offered to make Michael a producer in a movie about his family. Everyone Has Standards: Even he draws the line at people trying to sleep with supposedly comatose patients.Narrator: [upon seeing the nurse and reporter get into bed with Buster who's pretending to be in a coma] Oh my.
